mnemonics: Encoder-Decoder: E for Encoding, D for Decoding
Low-Resource Situations: Focus on Limited Data, Limited Context
MT Evaluation: BLEU Score, ROUGE Score, Human Evaluation
keyPoints: Encoder-Decoder Model: Uses Encoder to Understand Context, Decoder to Generate Output
Attention Mechanism: Helps Encoder and Decoder to Focus on Relevant Parts of Input/Output
Bias and Ethical Issues: Language Bias, Cultural Bias, Fairness and Diversity
Low-Resource Situations: Use Pre-Trained Models, Transfer Learning, Contextualized Embeddings
MT Evaluation: Metrics, Human Evaluation, Corpus-Based Evaluation
